div.p: 1. GraphQL sitePreviewJwt(scope, path, includeInvisible) uses Admin's _oauth2_proxy cookie (OAuth2-Proxy session)
3. short-lived JWT (10 s) signed with SITE_PREVIEW_SECRET payload: userId, scope, path, previewData
7. SSR GraphQL (drafts) Basic Auth: system-user (transport) draft access via x-include-invisible derived from __comet_site_preview JWT cookie
